# TODO(benvanik): remove this block after moved out of experimental.
set(IREE_PACKAGE_ROOT_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/../..)
# Canonicalize path.
cmake_path(ABSOLUTE_PATH IREE_PACKAGE_ROOT_DIR
  BASE_DIRECTORY ${IREE_PACKAGE_ROOT_DIR}
  NORMALIZE
  OUTPUT_VARIABLE IREE_PACKAGE_ROOT_DIR)
set(IREE_PACKAGE_ROOT_PREFIX iree)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_ABOVE_THIS_LINE ###

# CMake-only content.                                                          #

# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #
################################################################################

iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_cc_library(
  NAME
    hsa
  HDRS
    "api.h"
  SRCS
    "api.h"
  DEPS
    hsa_runtime::headers
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal
    iree::base::internal::arena
    iree::base::internal::flatcc::parsing
    iree::hal
    iree::schemas::executable_debug_info_c_fbs
    iree::schemas::hsa_executable_def_c_fbs

)
